ul.li: ABA Prevention: 64-bit version tag incremented on every change.
Hardware Requirements: Requires cmpxchg16b on x86_64 for atomic 128-bit swap.
Memory Management: Use Hazard Pointers or Epoch-based Reclamation to prevent Use-After-Free during pop.

text.tspan: // old_top now holds ptr to Node A
